decision: Use segregated user-service collaborators and interface assertions while preserving the existing NewService constructor signature for callers.
reason: This completes the ISP refactor within the listed users files without forcing unrelated call-site churn across handlers, auth middleware, and app wiring.

decision: Store segregated users-service collaborators instead of relying on a broad repository field
reason: This preserves the existing NewService call sites while aligning the listed users service methods with narrower ISP-oriented dependencies.
impact: Limits each users service path to the smallest required collaborator surface and adds compile-time test assertions for the segregated interfaces.
